claim_bullets.bullet_text: One useful thing is to write a .from function that gathers an iterable into a particular collection type. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.221-222)
As you recall, functions are mutable objects. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.221-222)
No, of course not, we can do anything we like with them. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.221-222)

source_record_text: This section discusses how to create .from functions to gather iterables into particular collection types, using JavaScript's built-in Array.from and custom implementations for other collections like Stack3 and Pair1.
